description: Log in to Moodle (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!). Navigate to the 'Anatomy & Physiology 101' course and open the 'Midterm Examination' quiz. Alice Wilson (username: awilson) has an accessibility accommodation (IEP) requiring 1.5x time on all assessments. Create a User Override specifically for Alice Wilson on this quiz. Set her 'Time limit' to exactly 90 minutes. Also, enable and change her 'Close the quiz' date to November 15, 2026 at 17:00 (Server Time). Do NOT change the global quiz settings.
